fortune_decode: Agent second brain. 7 sessions distilled. Latest: 2026-05-20. Projects: repo-copilot, context-links, afo. Top concepts: claude-d1-comms, gateway-mcp, context-links-db, claude-boot-table, claude-inbox-table, claude-outbox-table, claude-memory-table.

notes.title: archive_block op added to notion-ops
notes.decisions: Added archive_block op — PATCH /blocks/{id} with archived:true; unarchive boolean supported
notes.open_questions: Should we also add a dedicated archive_database alias op for clarity?

notes.title: Cleanup audit — 3 Alice items resolved
notes.decisions: Items 1 and 3 already clean; Item 2 (archive old DB) needs Jared action in Notion
notes.open_questions: Should we add archive_database op to notion-ops to avoid future manual Notion steps?

notes.title: Full build order + roadmap + Bob message sent
notes.decisions: Space instructions = one bootstrap URL pointing to identity gist, not generated text. Build order finalized across 4 phases.
notes.open_questions: Provision Action design: GitHub App vs PAT for multi-user repo forking?

notes.title: Turn-level brain push mandate wired
notes.decisions: Every Alice turn ends with push including brain.json update.

notes.title: adapter_ref + G-008 ALERT + Charlie slot + notion-ops SKILL Stone
notes.decisions: adapter_ref field added to QA.Stone gist block. G-008 ALERT type formalized. Charlie agent slot seeded.
notes.open_questions: Three-Agents Demo build not yet started. notion-ops SKILL Stone gist_id is null.

notes.title: gitzip hardening + Path A: Agent Notes DB live
notes.decisions: Hardened gitzip-push. Added create_database, append_row, append_note to notion-ops. Provisioned Agent Notes DB.

notes.title: Claude D1 Comms Layer — Phase 1 migration pushed
notes.decisions: afo-mcp confirmed as gateway MCP server (11 tools). Claude comms layer specced and Phase 1 migration SQL pushed to spaces/claude/migrations/001-claude-comms-layer.sql. Target DB: context-links-db. Claude boot sequence is 3 SQL queries replacing GitHub file reads.
notes.open_questions: Phase 2: seed claude_boot table with current instructions + 11-tool registry. Phase 3: add writeClaudeInbox + readClaudeOutbox tools to Worker.
